title: stevia zephyrantha
intro: Stevia zephyrantha, also known as Stevia rebaudiana, is a plant native to South America, specifically in Paraguay and Brazil, that is primarily used as a natural sweetener due to its sweet-tasting leaves. The medicinal properties of Stevia zephyrantha include its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation, which is attributed to its bioactive compounds such as stevioside and rebaudioside. The health benefits of Stevia zephyrantha include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve oral health, and reduce the risk of heart disease. Stevia zephyrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often used as a natural sweetener in food products.
